notes: The game runs *Perfectly* on my system, only issues are; when the game starts, the cut scene stutters, the flames for some reason didn't seem to render (at  the hotel after the elevator drop sequence), cant exit properly because it hangs, & lastly when going to the controller options, the game stays at "release all keys" & nothing  would make the game exit that option...
title: Alone in the Dark

notes: Game launches and works up to the main menu, when trying to start the game it crashes. Different Proton launch options and disabling Steam overlays made no difference.
title: Alone in the Dark

notes: Game crashes after selecting "new game" from the main menu. Also if you hit any key during the intro logo sequence plays the game pauses for a couple of seconds. Tried different Proton launch options without success.
title: Alone in the Dark

notes: Starts, gets to the main screen, able to change config and everything. But when you try to start a new game, it just crashes, so, it's "crucially unplayable". Proton bugtracker entry: https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/issues/2614
title: Alone in the Dark

notes: In settings no 1080 resolution offered so used 720.  Game played fine, no issues.
